title: EARLY LEARNING COORDINATION - 211info
text: TIGARD-TUALATIN FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER EARLY LEARNING COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and referrals to families about early learning, preschool programs, parenting support, basic needs, health and information, and referral to community partners. 9550 SW Murdock Street Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-6 or pregnant individuals Hours: By appointment only. Class times and locations vary. (503) 603-1582 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 603-1585 Main phone Main phone (503) 603-1582 Bilingual English/Spanish Veronica INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information. May need to leave a message. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Tigard-Tualatin School District SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm by appointment only TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The nearest Trimet bus stop at Hall & Murdock is a one-mile walk to the center located on the campus of Templeton Elementary School. Services: Children's Play Groups Parent/Child Activity Groups Parenting Skills Classes Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TIGARD-TUALATIN FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TIGARD-TUALATIN FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER
